sub_modules.fft16_index_gen: Combinational radix-2 DIT address generator. Converts the current stage and butterfly counter into in-place memory indices p/q and the corresponding twiddle index.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient ROM for N=16 using the exact cos/sin table specified.
sub_modules.fft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point complex radix-2 butterfly. Reuses one multiplier set for FFT and IFFT modes by selecting the sign of the sine term.
sub_modules.fft16_output_scale: Combinational output normalization block. Passes FFT results unchanged and divides IFFT results by N using an arithmetic right shift.
